memos.content: App Store screenshots — 5 cuts, 2880x1800, dark theme, amber accent #d97706.
Subtitle locked: 'Local-first AI agent workspace' (30 chars).
Review Notes: keep 'evaluation period' wording, never 'free trial'.
Created by Claude Code via skills/hearth — DB write auto-refreshed every open tab.
Try: 'Summarize today's PR work into a new project with a review meeting tomorrow at 3pm.'
Privacy policy: Data Not Collected. SQLite stays on the user's Mac, no remote server.
Marketing URL hearth.codewithgenie.com — single-page, dark theme, amber CTA.
Inbox zero ritual: Cmd+F 'todo', batch into projects, archive everything older than 14 days.
Quick Capture (Ctrl+Shift+H) is the single source of truth for fleeting thoughts.
Read 'Local-first software' (Ink & Switch, 2019) — seven ideals checklist.
Watch Martin Kleppmann's CRDT talk before Tuesday's reading group.
Inbox: hero shot for App Preview should hold the CC -> Hearth split for ~7s.

schedules.notes: Dummy DB only. Live DB is backed up at ~/.hearth-backup-pre-screenshots-20260426/.
